title: veronica missurica subsp. missurica
intro: Veronica missurica subsp. missurica, also known as Missouri speedwell, is a perennial plant species native to the United States. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various respiratory issues and reducing inflammation. The plant contains iridoid glycosides, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, such as relieving coughs, colds, and flu symptoms, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing stress. Herbal preparations of Veronica missurica subsp. missurica often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
